title: Why Millionaires Keep Exactly $2,467 in Their Checking
hook: While you're trying to build your savings account, the wealthy are doing something completely backwards with their cash.
angle: Reveals the counterintuitive 'cash allocation strategy' wealthy people use — keeping minimal amounts in checking accounts and strategically placing money elsewhere — opposite of what broke people do who hoard cash in low-yield accounts thinking it's 'safe.'
audience: Mid-career professionals (30-45) who have finally built up savings but don't know the next strategic move
key_numbers: Average millionaire keeps only $2,467 in checking
Regular person keeps 3.2 months expenses sitting idle
High-yield accounts paying 5.3% vs 0.01% in big bank checking
